title: CAMPS - 211info
text: SILVER FALLS FAMILY YMCA CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth camps, including both overnight and day camps. Day camp locations are offered at multiple sites throughout the community. 601 Miller Street Silverton, OR 97381 Eligibility: Most activities for ages 1st grade-10th grade Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 873-0205 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 873-0205 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service, scholarships available. DOCUMENTS: If applying for scholarships: current pay stubs, copies of most recent tax returns, documentation of any other form of income (SSI/SSD, public assistance, unemployment, etc.) AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 6am-1pm and 3:30pm-7:30pm, Saturday-Sunday noon-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From S Water Street, follow signs to Silver Falls State Park. Located in the Silverton Community Center, across the street from the Chamber of Commerce and library. Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SILVER FALLS FAMILY YMCA
